title: Why most product demos win the room and lose the rollout

slides.heading: Why most product demos win the room and lose the rollout
slides.body: Notes from shipping software to real teams.

slides.heading: A demo runs on clean, hand-picked inputs.
slides.body: Production runs on whatever users actually send.

slides.heading: Make the happy path boring and the edge cases loud.
slides.body: Handle the mess before you polish the pitch.

slides.heading: Earn the rollout, not just the applause.

package.prompt: Render a 4-slide LinkedIn carousel in the tenant's design system (paper background, accent color, and display/body fonts from design-system/tokens.json). Slide copy as provided.
